description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a streamlined, angular design and a predominantly metallic gray finish. The body features a long, rectangular barrel with multiple venting slots along the sides, likely for heat dissipation. At the rear, there is a compact, angular stock with a brown grip, and the trigger area is enclosed by a geometric guard. The top of the shotgun includes a translucent blue section, possibly representing a sight or rail system. The front end is open, showing the barrel's muzzle, while the underside has a black component that may serve as a magazine or attachment point. The overall construction suggests a tactical, urban-use firearm with a focus on functionality and modern aesthetics.
description: A sleek, metallic gray shotgun with vented barrel, angular stock, and translucent blue sighting element, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open muzzle and parallel barrel structure, with venting slots visible along the sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated barrel, venting slots, translucent blue top section, and angular brown grip at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact stock, brown grip, and the alignment of the barrel and sighting rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the venting slots, top rail, and rear grip.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with venting slots along the sides and a long, rectangular profile
attribute_trigger_guard_design: angular, elongated trigger guard with a geometric, squared-off shape and no visible finger grooves
